title: Fix scout filter to exclude image editing models

log.context: Fix scout filter to exclude image editing models

Looks good. Here's what changed in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/scout_local.py`:

**Pipeline tag set** (lines 46-47): added `image-editing` and `inpainting` as exact-match tags.

**Tag substring set** (line 74): added `inpaint`, `image-edit`, `diffusion`, `outpaint` — so any pipeline tag containing these strings gets blocked even if it's not an exact match (e.g. `stable-diffusion-inpainting`).
